projectWorkflowQueryDataStaticPlan.input: One immutable JSON-safe request with kind mode, query-properties, field-map, list-variable, or loop-properties and a matching static DTO value.
projectWorkflowQueryDataStaticPlan.return: A deeply frozen JSON-safe projection containing the same kind and deterministic static value.
projectWorkflowQueryDataStaticPlan.errors: Unsupported projection kinds, unsupported source types, and more than two sorts retain explicit deterministic failures.
projectWorkflowQueryDataStaticPlan.immutability: The Core projection does not mutate caller input and returns a deeply frozen result.

projectWorkflowStaticPlan.input: One immutable JSON-safe Workflow static-plan request with an approved normalization, layout, condition, label, mapping, or static DTO kind.
projectWorkflowStaticPlan.return: A deeply frozen JSON-safe projection containing the matching deterministic static value.
projectWorkflowStaticPlan.errors: Unsupported projection kinds retain an explicit deterministic failure.
projectWorkflowStaticPlan.immutability: The Core projection does not mutate caller input and returns a deeply frozen result.

projectDataListFormControlStaticSchema.input: A tagged, JSON-safe Data List form-control schema snapshot or scalar discriminator only.
projectDataListFormControlStaticSchema.return: A frozen tagged deterministic string or boolean control-schema projection.
projectDataListFormControlStaticSchema.errors: Unsupported kinds fail closed with an explicit deterministic error.
projectDataListFormControlStaticSchema.immutability: The Core projection does not mutate caller input and returns a frozen result.

projectApplicationPlanStaticFoundation.input: One tagged JSON-safe request for approved application-plan parsing, scalar normalization, or a materialization failure DTO made only from JSON-safe findings and context.
projectApplicationPlanStaticFoundation.return: A deeply frozen JSON-safe tagged result with the deterministic parser, scalar, or failure DTO value.
projectApplicationPlanStaticFoundation.errors: Unsupported kinds, invalid regular-expression markers, and non-JSON-safe failure DTO inputs fail closed with explicit deterministic errors.
projectApplicationPlanStaticFoundation.immutability: The Core projection does not mutate caller input and returns a deeply frozen result.
